{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324114541AAF1EE01F45CCF08D739"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598607273063318296","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"诡秘同文里面，这本书算是我看过的写的最流畅的了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769254834,"group_id":"7588876686507117592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8GlJ4VW4QL8gLzwpMMSTnU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110931884740","user_name":"严刑逼供的加格"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110931884740","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588876686507117592","book_info":{"abstract":"周阳作为21世纪的三好青年，却被大运送到了一个全新的陌生的高武世界中，从前身的记忆中听说过有人力能拔山的巨人，有点石成金的修仙者，他刚穿越过来，竟然还成了被养父母抛弃的假少爷
就在周阳以为自己还没有开始就要结束的时候，他的脑海中觉醒了诡秘之主中的二十二条成神途径，：占卜家、偷盗者、学徒、观众、歌颂者、水手、阅读者、秘祈人、不眠者、收尸人、战士、刺客、猎人、窥秘人、通识者、怪物、耕种者、药师、罪犯、囚犯、律师、仲裁人
二十二条成神途径让他看到了活下去的希望，他也给自己定了一个小目标，先好好地活下去，然后再去这个世界的顶峰看一看。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/881f47e9230446488c6a882a804e1297","author":"苹果黄瓜汁","author_id":"","book_id":"7588876686507117592","book_name":"诡秘登神路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6436人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":513,"name":"高武世界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=513&name=高武世界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588876802513191448","read_count":"6436","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"694079"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.6","serial_count":"176","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,高武世界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/01344cf1b2d8ded9bc49f059ab3247bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507941&x-signature=flC9mWroYUJqja0zwww3gzuvXH4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3516695684588820","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324114541AAF1EE01F45CCF08D739"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
